name: Alliance Bank
description_short: Community bank in southeast Missouri offering checking, savings, loans, and business accounts with five local branches focused on relationship-based banking.
description_long:
Alliance Bank was founded in 1997 by David Erlbacher and local business owners in response to the consolidation of regional banks into national chains that lost community focus. The founders envisioned a bank that would remain rooted in southeast Missouri, prioritizing relationships with local customers and supporting community projects. The bank's legal headquarters is located at 217 North Kingshighway in Cape Girardeau, with additional full-service branches in Jackson, New Madrid, Oran, and Sikeston.

Alliance Bank offers a comprehensive menu of consumer and business financial services including personal checking and savings accounts, business accounts, personal and business loans, home mortgages, digital banking, check reordering, lost or stolen card replacement, and a help center. The bank markets its SmartSave product as a high-return, easy-access savings option and provides mortgage services for home purchases. All five locations are full-service branches capable of handling both consumer and business financial needs.

The bank distinguishes itself through its commitment to community-based banking, employing local "home grown" staff and electing board members who represent the community. Wade Bartels, the current President and CEO, emphasizes that customers receive partnerships with experienced bankers rather than just asset protection. The bank's mission explicitly states it aims to be "the preferred community bank provider of financial services in the markets we serve" with a focus on building lasting relationships.

Alliance Bank is a traditional regional community bank without apparent specialty lending programs, fintech innovation, or products targeting underserved populations. As a five-location bank serving only southeast Missouri, its geographic reach is extremely limited. The website provides minimal detail about specific loan terms, APRs, fees, or account requirements, making it difficult for prospective customers to evaluate specific product competitiveness.
pros: Five full-service local branches in southeast Missouri with in-person relationship banking
Locally-owned and operated since 1997 with community-focused board members and employees
Digital banking solutions available for convenient account access and transactions
Comprehensive financial services including personal, business, and mortgage products
Founded specifically to serve local businesses and community projects rather than national shareholders
Established 27-year operating history with consistent community presence
All branches can accommodate both consumer and business financial service needs
cons: Only serves five towns in southeast Missouri—no geographic reach beyond this limited region
Website provides no information about specific loan terms, APRs, fees, or account minimums
No apparent specialty products for credit-building, debt consolidation, or underserved populations
Limited digital presence and information for customers to evaluate products before visiting branches
Small regional bank with no national brand recognition or integrated services with larger networks

contact.address: 217 N Kingshighway St, Cape Girardeau, MO 63701

best_for: Southeast Missouri residents seeking relationship-based community banking with local decision-making
Small business owners in the Cape Girardeau, Sikeston, Jackson, Oran, or New Madrid areas
Homebuyers in southeast Missouri looking for mortgage lending from a locally-accountable lender
Customers prioritizing face-to-face banking relationships over digital-only or national bank options
diagnosis: Alliance Bank is best for southeast Missouri residents and business owners who value community-focused, relationship-based banking from a locally-owned institution. The main caveat is that it is exclusively a regional bank with no online-only or nationwide services, and the website lacks transparent pricing and product details needed for customers to compare rates and terms before visiting a branch.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 217 N Kingshighway St, Cape Girardeau, MO 63701
